noveltyJustification: Identified local inference as the first present-day material new compute feature, with an existing embedder seam and a phased Node-before-Rust decision.
ruledOut: Rust wrapper around ONNX Runtime for speed alone
Shared profile ID across runtime variants

summary: Local embedding inference adds offline/privacy/cost/reproducibility value and is material native compute today.
Rust is optional for MVP but attractive when one multimodal core is reused across systems.

direction: Rust ONNX wrapper for speed alone
reason: Node ONNX Runtime already executes native kernels.
